---
name: Feature request
about: 提交功能建议、交互优化或体验改进
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 背景 / Background
请描述当前场景或你遇到的问题。  
Please describe the current scenario or problem.

## 期望方案 / Proposed Solution
请描述你希望新增或调整的能力。  
Please describe the capability or change you would like to have.

## 为什么有价值 / Value
请说明这个需求能解决什么问题，或提升哪些体验。  
Please explain what problem this solves or what experience it improves.

## 可选替代方案 / Alternatives
如果你考虑过其他实现方式，也可以写在这里。  
If you have considered alternative approaches, please add them here.

## 补充说明 / Additional Context
可附上草图、截图、参考链接或其他背景信息。  
You can attach sketches, screenshots, reference links, or any other background information.
